# XCTest

**Class**

An abstract base class for creating, managing, and executing tests.

## Declaration

```swift
class XCTest
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTest] class provides shared functionality that [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase] and [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestSuite] use for creating, managing, and executing tests. In most cases, you subclass [doc://com.apple.xctest/documentation/XCTest/XCTestCase] directly when defining tests in your project.

## Examining Test Properties

- **name**: The name of the test.
- **testCaseCount**: The number of test cases in the test.
- **testRun**: The test run object that executes the test.
- **testRunClass**: The test run subclass to instantiate when the test runs, which records the test’s results.

## Setting Up and Tearing Down

- **setUp(completion:)**: Provides an opportunity to reset state asynchronously and handle errors before calling each test method in a test case.
- **setUpWithError()**: Provides an opportunity to reset state and to throw errors before calling each test method in a test case.
- **setUp()**: Provides an opportunity to reset state before calling each test method in a test case.
- **tearDown(completion:)**: Provides an opportunity to perform cleanup asynchronously and handle errors after each test method in a test case ends.
- **tearDownWithError()**: Provides an opportunity to perform cleanup and to throw errors after each test method in a test case ends.
- **tearDown()**: Provides an opportunity to perform cleanup after each test method in a test case ends.

## Running Tests

- **perform(_:)**: Executes a specific test.
- **run()**: Creates a test run instance and starts the test.

## Test cases and test methods

- **Defining Test Cases and Test Methods**: Add test cases and test methods to a test target to confirm that your code performs as expected.
- **XCTestCase**: The primary class for defining test cases, test methods, and performance tests.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Inherited By

- XCTestCase
- XCTestSuite

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
